# ipforge_dhcp_reservation (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "ipforge_dhcp_reservation" "printer" {
  scope_id    = "10.20.0.0"
  ip_address  = "10.20.0.50"
  mac_address = "aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff"
  name        = "lab-printer"
  description = "Static DHCP reservation managed by Terraform"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip_address` (String)
- `scope_id` (String)

### Optional

- `client_duid` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `iaid` (Number)
- `mac_address` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `source` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
